data.description: Umbrella for workstream 2: bugs and inconsistencies experimentally verified to (a) reproduce against the installed rebar (pipx nava-rebar) and (b) exist in current source at HEAD. Each child bug ticket includes a minimal repro (commands + output + exit codes), source file:line, expected vs actual, and a suggested RED test per the strict TDD protocol.
data.title: Audit 2026-06-09: verified bugs
